title: Remarxk's Create Recipe
description: Added the missing synthesis recipes for "create:Ultimate Factory", and increased the possibilities of automation.
body:
**Please use it in conjunction with "Create:Ultimate Factory".**  
This mod follows the "Create: Ultimate Factory" principle, only adding recipes and not modifying the game logic.  
Added 14 new synthetic formulas and improved the automatic production line for cosmetics.  
Such as:  

*   Netherrack recipe.
*   Powdered Obsidian recipe.
*   Gunpowder recipe.
*   Dirt recipe.
*   Magma cube spawn egg recipe. (You can generate froglight in the main world.)
*   Slime spawn egg recipe. (Slime ball resources are derived from circulation.)  
    etc.
